email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van International Sales Support Officer (tijdelijk, min. 6 maanden) bij Page Personnel Belgium. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte rol in een internationale omgeving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheer van klantrelaties, het opvolgen van bestellingen en het coördineren met verschillende afdelingen. Ik heb ervaring met CRM-systemen, orderverwerking en het oplossen van klantvragen. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling en SEO stelt mij in staat om processen te optimaliseren en bij te dragen aan ERP-implementaties.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en heb een B1-niveau Nederlands, dat ik actief verbeter. Mijn ervaring in logistiek (Katoen Natie) en front-end ontwikkeling (ViviDoctor) heeft mij geleerd om nauwkeurig en zelfstandig te werken in een dynamische omgeving.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een persoonlijk gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the position of International Sales Support Officer (temporary, min. 6 months) at Page Personnel Belgium. Your call for a customer-oriented role in an international environment aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client relationships, follow up on orders, and coordinate with various departments. I have experience with CRM systems, order processing, and resolving customer inquiries. My technical background in web development and SEO enables me to optimize processes and contribute to ERP implementations.

I am fluent in English and have a B1 level in Dutch, which I am actively improving. My experience in logistics (Katoen Natie) and front-end development (ViviDoctor) has taught me to work accurately and independently in a dynamic environment.

I look forward to explaining my motivation and skills in a personal interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel interesse reageer ik op de vacature voor International Sales Support Officer bij Page Personnel Belgium. Uw beschrijving van een klantgerichte rol in een internationale omgeving spreekt mij zeer aan, en ik ben ervan overtuigd dat mijn ervaring en vaardigheden goed aansluiten bij de functie.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik dagelijks bezig met klantcontact en het beheren van bestellingen. Ik zorg voor een accurate en tijdige verwerking van orders in het ERP-systeem, coördineer met logistieke partners en volg de levering op tot aan de facturatie. Daarnaast los ik klachten en vragen proactief op, in samenwerking met verschillende afdelingen zoals operations en supply chain. Mijn ervaring met CRM-systemen en data-analyse stelt mij in staat om processen te optimaliseren en bij te dragen aan een verbeterde klantervaring.

Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling en SEO heeft mij geleerd om gestructureerd en probleemoplossend te werken. Bij ViviDoctor ontwikkelde ik front-end features voor een webapplicatie, wat mijn oog voor detail en kwaliteit versterkte. In de logistiek bij Katoen Natie leerde ik efficiënt en nauwkeurig werken in een snelle omgeving.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en heb een B1-niveau Nederlands, dat ik actief verbeter. Mijn interculturele ervaring (Turkse achtergrond, wonend in België) helpt mij om effectief te communiceren in een internationale context.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn klantgerichte instelling en organisatorische vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw team. Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very interested in the position of International Sales Support Officer at Page Personnel Belgium. Your description of a customer-oriented role in an international environment appeals to me greatly, and I am convinced that my experience and skills align well with the function.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle customer contact and order management on a daily basis. I ensure accurate and timely processing of orders in the ERP system, coordinate with logistics partners, and follow up on delivery through to invoicing. Additionally, I proactively resolve complaints and inquiries in collaboration with various departments such as operations and supply chain. My experience with CRM systems and data analysis enables me to optimize processes and contribute to an improved customer experience.

My technical background in web development and SEO has taught me to work in a structured and problem-solving manner. At ViviDoctor, I developed front-end features for a web application, which strengthened my attention to detail and quality. In logistics at Katoen Natie, I learned to work efficiently and accurately in a fast-paced environment.

I am fluent in English and have a B1 level in Dutch, which I am actively improving. My intercultural experience (Turkish background, living in Belgium) helps me communicate effectively in an international context.

I am motivated to apply my customer-oriented attitude and organizational skills to your team. I hope to further explain my motivation in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Customer-oriented experience: managing client relationships, order processing, and complaint resolution at Episto.
- Order-to-cash process: handling orders, coordinating with logistics, and supporting billing activities.
- Cross-functional collaboration: working with operations, supply chain, and finance teams.
- CRM and ERP familiarity: using CRM systems and ERP for order management and data tracking.
- Fluent English and B1 Dutch, with strong communication skills in an international environment.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I manage client relationships, handle order processing, and coordinate with logistics and other departments to ensure timely delivery and customer satisfaction. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across CRM systems, order management, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & order management: order processing, order-to-cash, complaint handling, customer support, CRM systems
- Cross-functional coordination: collaboration with sales, supply chain, production, and finance teams
- Process improvement: contributing to ERP implementation projects, optimizing workflows
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client relationships, handle inquiries and complaints, and ensure timely follow-up on customer requests
- Process customer orders accurately in the ERP system, coordinate shipment planning with logistics partners, and support billing activities including invoice processing and discrepancy resolution
- Collaborate with operations, supply chain, and finance departments to ensure smooth order-to-cash flow
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
